datasets.name: ds_crs__repunc
queryLines:
SELECT
      `crs_version`,
      `transmitting_country`,
      `receiving_country`,
      `message_ref_id`,
      `message_type_indic`,
      `reporting_period`,
      `anio_fiscal`,
      `timestamp`,
      `timestamp_month`,
      `status`,
      `in_reporting_fi`,
      `name_reporting_fi`,
      `address_free_reporting_fi`,
      `address_fix_reporting_fi`,
      `address_free_fix_reporting_fi`,
      `doc_type_indic_reporting_fi`,
      `doc_ref_id_reporting_fi`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_reporting_fi`,
      `in_sponsor`,
      `name_sponsor`,
      `address_free_sponsor`,
      `address_fix_sponsor`,
      `address_free_fix_sponsor`,
      `doc_type_indic_sponsor`,
      `doc_ref_id_sponsor`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_sponsor`,
      `doc_type_indic_account_report`,
      `doc_ref_id_account_report`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_account_report`,
      `account_number_account_report`,
      `account_number_type`,
      `undocumented_account`,
      `closed_account`,
      `dormant_account`,
      `tin_individual`,
      `name_individual`,
      `address_free_individual`,
      `address_fix_individual`,
      `address_free_fix_individual`,
      `birth_date_individual`,
      `city_birth_info_individual`,
      `country_code_birth_info_individual`,
      `in_organisation`,
      `name_organisation`,
      `address_free_organisation`,
      `address_fix_organisation`,
      `address_free_fix_organisation`,
      `tin_controlling_person`,
      `name_controlling_person`,
      `address_free_controlling_person`,
      `address_fix_controlling_person`,
      `address_free_fix_controlling_person`,
      `birth_date_controlling_person`,
      `city_birth_info_controlling_person`,
      `country_code_birth_info_controlling_person`,
      `account_balance`,
      `curr_code_account_balance`,
      `payment_type_crs501`,
      `curr_code_crs501`,
      `payment_type_crs502`,
      `curr_code_crs502`,
      `payment_type_crs503`,
      `curr_code_crs503`,
      `payment_type_crs504`,
      `curr_code_crs504`,
      `tipo_de_cambio_usd`,
      `account_balance_usd`,
      `tipo_de_cambio_mxn`,
      `account_balance_mxn`,
      `rfc_localizado`,
      `marca_rfc`,
      `nombre_higienizado`,
      `domicilio_higienizado`,
      `id_ejecucion`,
      `operacion`,
      `name`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`filter_menu_crs`) AS DOUBLE) as `filter_menu_crs`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`registros_crs_reporte_unc`) AS DOUBLE) as `registros_crs_reporte_unc`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`crs_registros_global_rep_unc`) AS DOUBLE) as `crs_registros_global_rep_unc`
  FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_crs__repunc
  GROUP BY
      `crs_version`,
      `transmitting_country`,
      `receiving_country`,
      `message_ref_id`,
      `message_type_indic`,
      `reporting_period`,
      `anio_fiscal`,
      `timestamp`,
      `timestamp_month`,
      `status`,
      `in_reporting_fi`,
      `name_reporting_fi`,
      `address_free_reporting_fi`,
      `address_fix_reporting_fi`,
      `address_free_fix_reporting_fi`,
      `doc_type_indic_reporting_fi`,
      `doc_ref_id_reporting_fi`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_reporting_fi`,
      `in_sponsor`,
      `name_sponsor`,
      `address_free_sponsor`,
      `address_fix_sponsor`,
      `address_free_fix_sponsor`,
      `doc_type_indic_sponsor`,
      `doc_ref_id_sponsor`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_sponsor`,
      `doc_type_indic_account_report`,
      `doc_ref_id_account_report`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_account_report`,
      `account_number_account_report`,
      `account_number_type`,
      `undocumented_account`,
      `closed_account`,
      `dormant_account`,
      `tin_individual`,
      `name_individual`,
      `address_free_individual`,
      `address_fix_individual`,
      `address_free_fix_individual`,
      `birth_date_individual`,
      `city_birth_info_individual`,
      `country_code_birth_info_individual`,
      `in_organisation`,
      `name_organisation`,
      `address_free_organisation`,
      `address_fix_organisation`,
      `address_free_fix_organisation`,
      `tin_controlling_person`,
      `name_controlling_person`,
      `address_free_controlling_person`,
      `address_fix_controlling_person`,
      `address_free_fix_controlling_person`,
      `birth_date_controlling_person`,
      `city_birth_info_controlling_person`,
      `country_code_birth_info_controlling_person`,
      `account_balance`,
      `curr_code_account_balance`,
      `payment_type_crs501`,
      `curr_code_crs501`,
      `payment_type_crs502`,
      `curr_code_crs502`,
      `payment_type_crs503`,
      `curr_code_crs503`,
      `payment_type_crs504`,
      `curr_code_crs504`,
      `tipo_de_cambio_usd`,
      `account_balance_usd`,
      `tipo_de_cambio_mxn`,
      `account_balance_mxn`,
      `rfc_localizado`,
      `marca_rfc`,
      `nombre_higienizado`,
      `domicilio_higienizado`,
      `id_ejecucion`,
      `operacion`,
      `name`

datasets.name: ds_crs_sabana
queryLines:
SELECT
    `accountnumber_accountreport`,
    `acctholdertype_accountholder`,
    `anio_fiscal`,
    `birthdate_controllingperson`,
    `birthdate_individual`,
    `contact`,
    `messagerefid`,
    `messagetype`,
    `paymenttype_payment`,
    `receivingcountry`,
    `reportingperiod`,
    `timestamp`,
    `timestamp_month`,
    `transmittingcountry`,
    `warning`,
    `fechainsercion`,
    `fechainsercion_month`,
    TRY_CAST(`idejecucion` AS STRING) as `idejecucion`,
    `nametype_individual`,
    `nametype_organisation`,
    `p_fechainsercion`,
    `p_fechainsercion_month`,
    `version`,
    `registros_crs_sabana`,
    `crs_registros_global_sabana`
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `accountnumber_accountreport`,
      `acctholdertype_accountholder`,
      `anio_fiscal`,
      `birthdate_controllingperson`,
      `birthdate_individual`,
      `contact`,
      `messagerefid`,
      `messagetype`,
      `paymenttype_payment`,
      `receivingcountry`,
      `reportingperiod`,
      `timestamp`,
      `timestamp_month`,
      `transmittingcountry`,
      `warning`,
      `fechainsercion`,
      `fechainsercion_month`,
      `idejecucion`,
      `nametype_individual`,
      `nametype_organisation`,
      `p_fechainsercion`,
      `p_fechainsercion_month`,
      `version`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`registros_crs_sabana`) AS DOUBLE) as `registros_crs_sabana`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`crs_registros_global_sabana`) AS DOUBLE) as `crs_registros_global_sabana`
    FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_crs_sabana
    GROUP BY
      `accountnumber_accountreport`,
      `acctholdertype_accountholder`,
      `anio_fiscal`,
      `birthdate_controllingperson`,
      `birthdate_individual`,
      `contact`,
      `messagerefid`,
      `messagetype`,
      `paymenttype_payment`,
      `receivingcountry`,
      `reportingperiod`,
      `timestamp`,
      `timestamp_month`,
      `transmittingcountry`,
      `warning`,
      `fechainsercion`,
      `fechainsercion_month`,
      `idejecucion`,
      `nametype_individual`,
      `nametype_organisation`,
      `p_fechainsercion`,
      `p_fechainsercion_month`,
      `version`

datasets.name: ds_fat_repunc
queryLines:
SELECT
    `account_closed`,
    `account_number`,
    `account_number_type`,
    `address_fix_individual`,
    `address_fix_intermediary`,
    `address_fix_organisation`,
    `address_fix_reporting_fi`,
    `address_fix_sponsor`,
    `address_fix_substantial_owner_individual`,
    `address_fix_substantial_owner_organisation`,
    `address_free_fix_individual`,
    `address_free_fix_intermediary`,
    `address_free_fix_organisation`,
    `address_free_fix_reporting_fi`,
    `address_free_fix_sponsor`,
    `address_free_fix_substantial_owner_individual`,
    `address_free_fix_substantial_owner_organisation`,
    `address_free_individual`,
    `address_free_intermediary`,
    `address_free_organisation`,
    `address_free_reporting_fi`,
    `address_free_sponsor`,
    `address_free_substantial_owner_individual`,
    `address_free_substantial_owner_organisation`,
    `birth_date_individual`,
    `birth_date_substantial_owner_individual`,
    `city_birth_date_individual`,
    `corr_doc_ref_id_account_report`,
    `corr_doc_ref_id_intermediary`,
    `corr_doc_ref_id_nil_report`,
    `corr_doc_ref_id_reporting_fi`,
    `corr_doc_ref_id_sponsor`,
    `corr_message_ref_id`,
    `corr_message_ref_id_account_report`,
    `corr_message_ref_id_intermediary`,
    `corr_message_ref_id_nil_report`,
    `corr_message_ref_id_reporting_fi`,
    `corr_message_ref_id_sponsor`,
    `country_code_country_info_individual`,
    `curr_code_account_balance`,
    `curr_code_fatca501`,
    `curr_code_fatca502`,
    `curr_code_fatca503`,
    `curr_code_fatca504`,
    `marca_rfc`,
    `message_ref_id`,
    `name`,
    `name_individual`,
    `name_organisation`,
    `receiving_country`,
    `reporting_period`,
    `rfc_localizado`,
    `tin_individual`,
    `tin_organisation`,
    `timestamp`,
    `timestamp_month`,
    `transmitting_country`,
    TRY_CAST(`id_ejecucion` AS STRING) as `id_ejecucion`,
    `registros_rep_unico`,
    `filter_menu_fatca`,
    `fat_registros_global_rep_unc`
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `account_closed`,
      `account_number`,
      `account_number_type`,
      `address_fix_individual`,
      `address_fix_intermediary`,
      `address_fix_organisation`,
      `address_fix_reporting_fi`,
      `address_fix_sponsor`,
      `address_fix_substantial_owner_individual`,
      `address_fix_substantial_owner_organisation`,
      `address_free_fix_individual`,
      `address_free_fix_intermediary`,
      `address_free_fix_organisation`,
      `address_free_fix_reporting_fi`,
      `address_free_fix_sponsor`,
      `address_free_fix_substantial_owner_individual`,
      `address_free_fix_substantial_owner_organisation`,
      `address_free_individual`,
      `address_free_intermediary`,
      `address_free_organisation`,
      `address_free_reporting_fi`,
      `address_free_sponsor`,
      `address_free_substantial_owner_individual`,
      `address_free_substantial_owner_organisation`,
      `birth_date_individual`,
      `birth_date_substantial_owner_individual`,
      `city_birth_date_individual`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_account_report`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_intermediary`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_nil_report`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_reporting_fi`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_sponsor`,
      `corr_message_ref_id`,
      `corr_message_ref_id_account_report`,
      `corr_message_ref_id_intermediary`,
      `corr_message_ref_id_nil_report`,
      `corr_message_ref_id_reporting_fi`,
      `corr_message_ref_id_sponsor`,
      `country_code_country_info_individual`,
      `curr_code_account_balance`,
      `curr_code_fatca501`,
      `curr_code_fatca502`,
      `curr_code_fatca503`,
      `curr_code_fatca504`,
      `marca_rfc`,
      `message_ref_id`,
      `name`,
      `name_individual`,
      `name_organisation`,
      `receiving_country`,
      `reporting_period`,
      `rfc_localizado`,
      `tin_individual`,
      `tin_organisation`,
      `timestamp`,
      `timestamp_month`,
      `transmitting_country`,
      `id_ejecucion`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`registros_rep_unico`) AS DOUBLE) as `registros_rep_unico`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`filter_menu_fatca`) AS DOUBLE) as `filter_menu_fatca`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`fat_registros_global_rep_unc`) AS DOUBLE) as `fat_registros_global_rep_unc`
    FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_fat_repunc
    GROUP BY
      `account_closed`,
      `account_number`,
      `account_number_type`,
      `address_fix_individual`,
      `address_fix_intermediary`,
      `address_fix_organisation`,
      `address_fix_reporting_fi`,
      `address_fix_sponsor`,
      `address_fix_substantial_owner_individual`,
      `address_fix_substantial_owner_organisation`,
      `address_free_fix_individual`,
      `address_free_fix_intermediary`,
      `address_free_fix_organisation`,
      `address_free_fix_reporting_fi`,
      `address_free_fix_sponsor`,
      `address_free_fix_substantial_owner_individual`,
      `address_free_fix_substantial_owner_organisation`,
      `address_free_individual`,
      `address_free_intermediary`,
      `address_free_organisation`,
      `address_free_reporting_fi`,
      `address_free_sponsor`,
      `address_free_substantial_owner_individual`,
      `address_free_substantial_owner_organisation`,
      `birth_date_individual`,
      `birth_date_substantial_owner_individual`,
      `city_birth_date_individual`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_account_report`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_intermediary`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_nil_report`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_reporting_fi`,
      `corr_doc_ref_id_sponsor`,
      `corr_message_ref_id`,
      `corr_message_ref_id_account_report`,
      `corr_message_ref_id_intermediary`,
      `corr_message_ref_id_nil_report`,
      `corr_message_ref_id_reporting_fi`,
      `corr_message_ref_id_sponsor`,
      `country_code_country_info_individual`,
      `curr_code_account_balance`,
      `curr_code_fatca501`,
      `curr_code_fatca502`,
      `curr_code_fatca503`,
      `curr_code_fatca504`,
      `marca_rfc`,
      `message_ref_id`,
      `name`,
      `name_individual`,
      `name_organisation`,
      `receiving_country`,
      `reporting_period`,
      `rfc_localizado`,
      `tin_individual`,
      `tin_organisation`,
      `timestamp`,
      `timestamp_month`,
      `transmitting_country`,
      `id_ejecucion`

datasets.name: ds_fat_sabana
queryLines:
SELECT
    `accountclosed`,
    `accountnumber`,
    `accountnumbertype`,
    `acctholdertype`,
    `birthdate_individual`,
    `birthdate_substantialowner_individual`,
    `contact`,
    `corrmessagerefid`,
    `messagerefid`,
    `messagetype`,
    `payment`,
    `paymenttype`,
    `receivingcountry`,
    `reportingperiod`,
    `timestamp`,
    `timestamp_month`,
    `transmittingcountry`,
    `warning`,
    `fechainsercion`,
    `fechainsercion_month`,
    TRY_CAST(`idejecucion` AS STRING) as `idejecucion`,
    `nametype_individual`,
    `nametype_organisation`,
    `p_fechainsercion`,
    `p_fechainsercion_month`,
    `version`,
    `registros_sabana`,
    `fat_registros_global_sabana`
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `accountclosed`,
      `accountnumber`,
      `accountnumbertype`,
      `acctholdertype`,
      `birthdate_individual`,
      `birthdate_substantialowner_individual`,
      `contact`,
      `corrmessagerefid`,
      `messagerefid`,
      `messagetype`,
      `payment`,
      `paymenttype`,
      `receivingcountry`,
      `reportingperiod`,
      `timestamp`,
      `timestamp_month`,
      `transmittingcountry`,
      `warning`,
      `fechainsercion`,
      `fechainsercion_month`,
      `idejecucion`,
      `nametype_individual`,
      `nametype_organisation`,
      `p_fechainsercion`,
      `p_fechainsercion_month`,
      `version`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`registros_sabana`) AS DOUBLE) as `registros_sabana`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`fat_registros_global_sabana`) AS DOUBLE) as `fat_registros_global_sabana`
    FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_fat_sabana
    GROUP BY
      `accountclosed`,
      `accountnumber`,
      `accountnumbertype`,
      `acctholdertype`,
      `birthdate_individual`,
      `birthdate_substantialowner_individual`,
      `contact`,
      `corrmessagerefid`,
      `messagerefid`,
      `messagetype`,
      `payment`,
      `paymenttype`,
      `receivingcountry`,
      `reportingperiod`,
      `timestamp`,
      `timestamp_month`,
      `transmittingcountry`,
      `warning`,
      `fechainsercion`,
      `fechainsercion_month`,
      `idejecucion`,
      `nametype_individual`,
      `nametype_organisation`,
      `p_fechainsercion`,
      `p_fechainsercion_month`,
      `version`
